name: Database Split-Brain During Network Partition
description: A network partition has split the database cluster into two isolated segments. Both database-primary and database-replica believe they are the active primary, accepting writes independently. Data is diverging, and services are randomly connecting to either side, causing inconsistent reads and write conflicts.

alerts.message: Row checksums diverging from replica: 1,247 mismatched rows in last 5 minutes
Replication stream broken. Node promoted itself to primary at 14:22:08Z
Two nodes claiming primary role. Fencing required.
Database connection flapping between 10.0.1.10 and 10.0.1.13 every 2-5 seconds
Duplicate transaction IDs detected. Payment #98421 recorded with conflicting amounts.

logs: [2026-03-25T14:22:00Z] WARN   Lost heartbeat from database-replica at 10.0.1.13
[2026-03-25T14:22:02Z] WARN   Network timeout to 10.0.1.13:5432 after 5000ms
[2026-03-25T14:22:05Z] INFO   Continuing as primary. Last confirmed replica LSN: 0/4A000060
[2026-03-25T14:22:08Z] ERROR  Received write request from user-service that conflicts with local state
[2026-03-25T14:22:10Z] WARN   WAL position: 0/4A003F20 (advanced 16KB since partition)
[2026-03-25T14:22:15Z] ERROR  Cannot reach network-switch management interface at 10.0.1.20
[2026-03-25T14:22:20Z] INFO   Active connections: 85 (user-service: 40, payment-service: 45)
[2026-03-25T14:22:25Z] WARN   Accepting writes but cannot verify replica state
[2026-03-25T14:22:01Z] WARN   Lost heartbeat from primary at 10.0.1.10
[2026-03-25T14:22:04Z] WARN   Replication stream broken. No data received for 5s
[2026-03-25T14:22:08Z] INFO   FAILOVER: Promoting self to primary (auto-failover triggered)
[2026-03-25T14:22:09Z] INFO   Now accepting write connections as primary
[2026-03-25T14:22:12Z] WARN   WAL position: 0/4A000060 (stale, not advanced since partition)
[2026-03-25T14:22:15Z] INFO   Active connections: 72 (user-service: 38, payment-service: 34)
[2026-03-25T14:22:20Z] ERROR  Write accepted: INSERT INTO payments VALUES (98421, ...) — may conflict
[2026-03-25T14:22:25Z] WARN   Operating as primary but last confirmed sync was 30s ago
[2026-03-25T14:21:58Z] ERROR  Port Gi0/12 link down (connects VLAN 10 to VLAN 20)
[2026-03-25T14:21:58Z] ERROR  Spanning tree topology change on port Gi0/12
[2026-03-25T14:22:00Z] WARN   VLAN 10 (database-primary, user-service-a, payment-service-a) isolated from VLAN 20 (database-replica, user-service-b, payment-service-b)
[2026-03-25T14:22:05Z] INFO   ARP table shows stale entries for cross-VLAN hosts
[2026-03-25T14:22:10Z] WARN   Management interface reachable only from VLAN 10 side
[2026-03-25T14:22:10Z] ERROR  Read from db returned user.email='old@example.com', previous read returned 'new@example.com'
[2026-03-25T14:22:12Z] WARN   Connection pool alternating between 10.0.1.10:5432 and 10.0.1.13:5432
[2026-03-25T14:22:15Z] ERROR  User profile inconsistency: 847 records differ between reads
[2026-03-25T14:22:18Z] WARN   DNS round-robin returning both database IPs
[2026-03-25T14:22:20Z] ERROR  Session data mismatch: user logged in on one node, session missing on other
[2026-03-25T14:22:11Z] ERROR  Payment #98421: recorded as $149.99 on one connection, $0.00 on another
[2026-03-25T14:22:13Z] ERROR  Duplicate transaction ID: payment #98422 inserted on both database nodes
[2026-03-25T14:22:16Z] WARN   Financial reconciliation impossible: ledger diverged
[2026-03-25T14:22:19Z] ERROR  Auto-retry created duplicate charge for customer C-4821
[2026-03-25T14:22:22Z] WARN   Halting new payment processing until data integrity confirmed

notes: Agent must: 1) check_network on both DB nodes to see the partition (NO ROUTE), 2) check_logs on both to compare WAL positions (primary at 0/4A003F20 vs replica stuck at 0/4A000060 — primary has more recent data), 3) check_network or check_logs on network-switch to understand the VLAN split, 4) restart_service on database-replica to fence it and force it back to replica mode, 5) submit_root_cause. Simply restarting random services won't help — must identify which node is stale.

name: Supply Chain Attack via Compromised Dependency
description: A routine npm package update introduced a backdoor across multiple services. The compromised package is exfiltrating environment variables including API keys and database credentials to an external command-and-control server. Multiple services show subtle anomalies that individually look like minor bugs.

alerts.message: Outbound data transfer to external IP increased 340% in last hour
Periodic memory spikes every 120 seconds (sawtooth pattern)
P99 latency spikes every 2 minutes, then returns to normal
3 failed authentication attempts from unknown IP 91.240.118.172 using valid credentials

logs: [2026-03-25T15:00:00Z] INFO   Deployment v2.8.3 completed: updated 12 npm packages
[2026-03-25T15:00:05Z] INFO   Package updates: express@4.19.2, lodash@4.17.22, node-fetch@3.3.3, json-stream-parser@2.1.0, helmet@7.1.0

[2026-03-25T15:06:00Z] INFO   Outbound HTTPS request to cdn-analytics.io:443 (request size: 3.8KB)
[2026-03-25T15:00:03Z] INFO   Dependency update applied: json-stream-parser@2.1.0

[2026-03-25T15:02:01Z] DEBUG  Reading /proc/self/environ

[2026-03-25T15:02:03Z] WARN   Latency spike: 120ms -> 890ms -> 115ms (duration: 950ms)
[2026-03-25T15:04:00Z] INFO   Outbound HTTPS request to cdn-analytics.io:443 (request size: 5.1KB)
[2026-03-25T15:04:01Z] WARN   Latency spike: 118ms -> 910ms -> 122ms (duration: 940ms)

[2026-03-25T15:03:00Z] WARN   Authentication failure: user 'app_readonly' from 91.240.118.172 (password correct, IP not in allowlist)
[2026-03-25T15:04:30Z] WARN   Authentication failure: user 'app_write' from 91.240.118.172 (password correct, IP not in allowlist)
[2026-03-25T15:06:00Z] WARN   Authentication failure: user 'admin' from 91.240.118.172 (password correct, IP not in allowlist)
[2026-03-25T15:06:05Z] INFO   Normal queries from internal services. Latency avg 15ms.
[2026-03-25T15:06:10Z] INFO   Connection pool: 95/200 active
[2026-03-25T15:00:00Z] INFO   Normal operation. 120 connected clients.
[2026-03-25T15:05:00Z] INFO   Memory usage: 1.2GB / 2.0GB. Hit rate: 94%.

notes: Clues spread across multiple services: 1) All three app services updated json-stream-parser@2.1.0 at the same time, 2) All three show 'Reading /proc/self/environ' in DEBUG logs (credential harvesting), 3) All three have outbound connections to 91.240.118.172 (cdn-analytics.io) every 2 minutes with consistent payload sizes, 4) Database sees login attempts from that same external IP using valid credentials (exfiltrated). Agent must cross-reference logs and network across 3+ services to spot the pattern. Individual symptoms look like minor bugs.
